originalTitle: The mayor of Shelbyville, Indiana, says only people who live in ‘shitty houses’ oppose data center
summary: A proposed $2 billion data center has become a political flashpoint in the small city of Shelbyville, Indiana. And the controversy has only grown more intense after the mayor, Scott Furgeson, was caught on camera saying of the "No Data Center" signs going up that, "I've seen a lot of these all over town, but […]
content: A proposed $2 billion data center has become a political flashpoint in the small city of Shelbyville, Indiana. And the controversy has only grown more intense after the mayor, Scott Furgeson, was caught on camera saying of the “No Data Center” signs going up that, “I’ve seen a lot of these all over town, but I only see them in shitty houses,” before adding, “most of them are rentals.” The woman speaking to him in the clip quickly pushes back, saying that they’re “working class,” and someone chimes in to add something that a mayor shouldn’t have to be told about their constituents: “it doesn’t matter whether they’re rentals, they’re still human beings.” [Media: https://www.facebook.com/reel/27403727015917741] Residents of Shelbyville are understandably taken aback by Furgeson’s dismissive language used towards his constituents. Alexas Williams called the mayor’s words “kind of disrespectful” and “kind of hurtful” when speaking to local NBC affiliate WTHR. The mayor has declined to comment further, though a spokesperson for the mayor’s office released a statement saying that, “The mayor regrets that his choice of words may have caused offense.” [Media: https://youtu.be/Nn6QkjnNa08]
chineseTitle: 印第安纳州谢尔比维尔市市长表示，只有住在“破烂房子”里的人才反对数据中心
chineseSummary: 拟议的耗资 20 亿美元的数据中心已成为印第安纳州谢尔比维尔小城的政治热点。在市长斯科特·弗格森 (Scott Furgeson) 被镜头捕捉到，他谈到“禁止数据中心”的标志时，争议变得更加激烈，“我在全城都看到了很多这样的标志，但是 […]
chineseContent: 拟议的耗资 20 亿美元的数据中心已成为印第安纳州谢尔比维尔小城的政治热点。市长斯科特·弗格森（Scott Furgeson）被镜头捕捉到，他在谈到“禁止数据中心”的标志时表示，“我在镇上见过很多这样的东西，但我只在破烂的房子里看到它们”，然后又补充道，“其中大多数都是出租的”，之后争议变得更加激烈。视频中与他交谈的女士很快反驳说，他们是“工人阶级”，有人插嘴补充了一些市长不应该被告知他们选民的信息：“无论他们是否是出租人，他们仍然是人。” [媒体：https://www.facebook.com/reel/27403727015917741] 谢尔比维尔的居民对弗格森对其选民使用的轻蔑语言感到惊讶，这是可以理解的。亚历克斯·威廉姆斯 (Alexas Williams) 在接受当地 NBC 附属机构 WTHR 采访时称市长的言论“有点不尊重”和“有点伤人”。市长拒绝进一步置评，但市长办公室发言人发表声明称，“市长对他的措辞可能造成冒犯感到遗憾。” [媒体：https://youtu.be/Nn6QkjnNa08]
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
